species: Hypocrates consists of a circularly permuted yellow fluorescent protein integrated into the structure of the transcription repressor NemR from Escherichia coli.
cell_type: we exemplify its applicability by imaging hypohalous stress in bacteria phagocytosed by primary neutrophils.
sample_source: To demonstrate the possibility of monitoring endogenous hypohalous stress with Hypocrates, we used human peripheral blood neutrophils...
cell_line: To test whether Hypocrates is functional in a eukaryotic system, we expressed the sensor in HeLa Kyoto cells...
